testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Those who worked with me, recommend.
testimonials.description: Real results from real clients. Every delivered project is a partnership of trust.

items.text: Orlando turned my idea into a professional online store in under 45 days. Today we sell across all of Brazil with a fast, beautiful site that actually converts.
We needed a bilingual site, GDPR compliant and that conveyed trust. The result exceeded expectations — professional, fast and patients constantly compliment it.
The online quote system completely changed our service. Clients already arrive knowing the price, reduced unnecessary calls and increased conversions.
Having 24 tours with dynamic pricing and direct bookings without intermediaries was a game changer. SEO is already bringing tourists organically. I recommend without hesitation.

steps.title: Conversation
steps.desc: We understand your business, audience, goals and specific needs. No commitment, no technical jargon.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.desc: We present the ideal plan with everything detailed: features, timeline and investment. Full transparency.

steps.title: Creation
steps.desc: We develop your site with you following along. Adjustments until final approval.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Site live, domain configured, training for you to manage everything yourself. Support included.

techStack.label: Technologies
techStack.title: Tools I use.
techStack.description: Modern stack tested in production. Each technology is chosen for the results it delivers to your business.

plans.label: Scopes
plans.title: What I can build for you.
plans.description: Every project is unique. Here are the three most common scopes I develop — the investment is always defined after understanding your specific needs.
plans.warning: A poorly made site costs you every day. Slow, no conversion or stuck on a generic template — you lose clients before they even see your product. A professional site works for you 24/7.
plans.guarantee: Satisfaction guarantee: Adjustments until final approval. If the result isn't as expected, we refine together until we get there.

pricingModel.title: How the investment works
pricingModel.description: Every business has different needs — that's why I don't work with fixed prices. After understanding your project, you receive a personalized, detailed and transparent proposal.
points: Free proposal with no commitment within 24 hours
One-time payment for creation (no mandatory monthly fee)
Up to 3x on card or PIX
Everything detailed in contract: scope, timeline and investment

list.name: Institutional Website
list.idealFor: Companies that need a professional online presence, with up to 5 pages and a focus on credibility.

list.name: E-Commerce
list.idealFor: Businesses that want to sell online with their own checkout, order management and full platform autonomy.

list.name: Custom Project
list.idealFor: Projects with specific requirements — SaaS, dashboards, integrations, apps or complete internal systems.

items.question: How long does it take to be ready?
items.answer: Institutional websites are ready in 7 to 15 days. E-commerces between 3 to 5 weeks. Custom projects depend on scope, but we set the deadline before starting.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
items.answer: No. The management panel is made for anyone to use. Plus, every project includes training so you can manage everything on your own.

items.question: What if I already have a site and want to improve it?
items.answer: We also work with redesign and migration. We analyze your current site and propose the necessary improvements.

items.question: What happens after launch?
items.answer: All plans include post-launch support. We also offer monthly maintenance plans for those who want continuous monitoring and updates.

items.question: Can I use my current domain?
items.answer: Yes! We configure it on the domain you already have or help register a new one.

items.question: Do you also build apps?
items.answer: Yes. For projects that need a mobile app, we develop with React Native. Talk to us so we can understand your need.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: We split into stages: a deposit to start the project and the rest on delivery. We accept PIX, transfer and card.

about.label: Who's behind it
about.name: Orlando Pedrazzoli
about.bio: I'm not an agency with 50 people. I'm a developer who understands business — because I spent 15 years founding and managing companies before writing my first line of code. Every project I develop gets the same dedication I gave to my own business. You talk directly to me, from first contact to final delivery.
about.whatsappMsg: Hi Orlando! I want to discuss my project.

highlights.title: Continuous learning

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Pedrazzoli Digital Privacy Policy. Learn how we collect, use and protect your personal data.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: Terms of Use for the Pedrazzoli Digital website. General conditions for using our web development services.

whatsapp.businessPrefix: Hello! I'm interested in a website for my business:

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content:
Pedrazzoli Digital, operated by Orlando Pedrazzoli, based in Lisbon, Portugal, values and respects the privacy of its visitors and clients. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store and protect your personal data when you access our website (https://pedrazzolidigital.com).

This policy complies with Brazil's General Data Protection Law (LGPD — Law No. 13.709/2018) and the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.title: 2. Data Controller
sections.content:
Controller: Orlando Pedrazzoli
Email: pedrazzoliorlando@gmail.com
Location: Lisbon, Portugal

sections.title: 3. Data We Collect
sections.content:
We may collect the following types of personal data:

Data you provide: Name, email, WhatsApp number, business type and message — when voluntarily filled in the contact form.

Automatically collected data: IP address (anonymized), browser type, operating system, pages visited, time spent, traffic source and interaction data — collected through analytics cookies, only with your prior consent.

Cookie data: Theme preferences (light/dark), cookie consent status and session identifiers. For more details, see section 7 (Cookies).

sections.title: 4. Purposes of Processing
sections.content:
We use your personal data to:

Respond to contact requests and send quotes; improve the browsing experience on the site; analyze site performance and traffic (with consent); comply with legal and tax obligations; and communicate updates about ongoing projects.

sections.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing (LGPD Art. 7)
sections.content:
Personal data processing is carried out based on:

Consent (Art. 7, I) — for analytics and marketing cookies. You can revoke your consent at any time.

Contract execution or preliminary procedures (Art. 7, V) — to respond to your contact form and send proposals.

Legitimate interest (Art. 7, IX) — to improve our services and site experience, when it does not override your rights.

sections.title: 6. Data Sharing
sections.content:
Your data may be shared with:

EmailJS — for contact form processing (data transits encrypted).

Google Analytics — for traffic analysis (only with your consent, anonymized data).

Vercel — for site hosting (basic access logs).

We do not sell, rent or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes without your explicit consent.

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.content:
We use cookies for essential site functionality and, with your consent, for traffic analysis. When you first visit our site, a cookie banner will be presented where you can accept, decline or customize your preferences.

The types of cookies we use are:

Essential: Necessary for the site to function (theme preferences, consent status). Cannot be disabled.

Analytics: Google Analytics for aggregated traffic data. Only activated with your consent.

Marketing: Social media pixels for targeted advertising. Only activated with your consent.

sections.title: 8. Your Rights (LGPD Art. 18 / GDPR Art. 15-22)
sections.content:
You have the right to:

Confirm the existence of data processing; access your personal data; correct incomplete or outdated data; request anonymization, blocking or deletion of unnecessary data; request data portability; revoke consent at any time; and be informed about entities with whom your data has been shared.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at pedrazzoliorlando@gmail.com. We will respond within 15 business days.

sections.title: 9. Data Retention
sections.content: Personal data provided via the contact form is retained for the time necessary to fulfill your request and, afterwards, for up to 5 years for tax compliance. Cookie data is retained according to each cookie's validity (maximum 13 months for analytics cookies).

sections.title: 10. Security
sections.content: We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss or destruction. The site uses HTTPS protocol (SSL/TLS encryption) and form data is transmitted encrypted via EmailJS.

sections.title: 11. International Transfer
sections.content: Some of our service providers (EmailJS, Google Analytics, Vercel) may process data on servers outside Brazil and Portugal. In these cases, we ensure that data is treated in compliance with LGPD and GDPR, based on standard contractual clauses or adequacy decisions.

sections.title: 12. Minors
sections.content: Our site and services are not directed at minors under 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect data from minors. If we become aware that data from a minor has been collected, we will proceed with its immediate deletion.

sections.title: 13. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically. We recommend that you check it regularly. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of this document.

sections.title: 14. Contact and Complaints
sections.content:
For questions, requests or complaints about the processing of your data, contact us:

Email: pedrazzoliorlando@gmail.com
WhatsApp: +351 912 164 220

If you consider that the processing of your data is not in compliance, you may file a complaint with Brazil's National Data Protection Authority (ANPD) or Portugal's National Data Protection Commission (CNPD).

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using the site https://pedrazzolidigital.com, operated by Pedrazzoli Digital (Orlando Pedrazzoli), you fully agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any of the terms, we ask that you do not use the site.

sections.title: 2. Description of Services
sections.content: Pedrazzoli Digital offers web development services, including institutional websites, online stores (e-commerce), custom web systems and digital project maintenance. The site serves as a showcase for our services and a contact channel with potential clients.

sections.title: 3. Use of the Site
sections.content: By using this site, you agree not to use it for illegal or unauthorized purposes; not to attempt to access restricted areas of the site or our servers; not to transmit viruses, malware or any malicious code; not to reproduce, duplicate or copy the site content without prior authorization; and to provide truthful information when filling out the contact form.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content:
All site content — including texts, design, source code, images, logos, icons and the Pedrazzoli Digital brand — is the exclusive property of Orlando Pedrazzoli and is protected by intellectual property laws of Brazil and Portugal.

Reproduction, distribution, modification or commercial use of any site content without prior written authorization is prohibited. Code for projects developed for clients is governed by specific service contracts.

sections.title: 5. Portfolio and Projects
sections.content: The projects presented in the portfolio section are real and represent work developed for Pedrazzoli Digital clients. Information, metrics and descriptions are presented with the consent of the respective clients. Links to client sites are provided for reference — we are not responsible for the content of third-party sites.

sections.title: 6. Contact Form
sections.content: Information submitted through the contact form is used exclusively to respond to your request and send commercial proposals. Data is processed according to our Privacy Policy. We do not use this data for newsletters or unsolicited communications.

sections.title: 7. Prices and Payments
sections.content: The values presented on the site are referential (starting from). The final value of each project is defined in a personalized commercial proposal after analyzing the client's specific needs. Payment terms, deadlines and conditions are established in individual service contracts.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.content:
Pedrazzoli Digital strives to keep the site available and with updated information, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or the total absence of errors. We are not responsible for indirect damages, data loss or lost profits resulting from the use or inability to use the site.

The site may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third-party site.

sections.title: 9. Availability
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend or discontinue any aspect of the site at any time, without prior notice. We may also perform scheduled maintenance that may result in temporary unavailability.

sections.title: 10. Changes to Terms
sections.content: These Terms of Use may be changed at any time. Changes take effect immediately after publication on the site. Continued use of the site after changes implies acceptance of the new terms. We recommend that you check this page periodically.

sections.title: 11. Applicable Law
sections.content: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the Portuguese Republic and Brazilian legislation (Consumer Defense Code and Law No. 13.709/2018 — LGPD), as applicable to the user's domicile. Any disputes shall be submitted to the courts of Lisbon, Portugal, or the consumer's domicile, as applicable.

sections.title: 12. Contact
sections.content:
For questions related to these Terms of Use, contact us:

Email: pedrazzoliorlando@gmail.com
WhatsApp: +351 912 164 220
